//: One fixture file per task_type, stored at fixtures/<task_type>/tier<N>_<name>.json and version-controlled. Fixtures are the regression suite for anything non-deterministic (LLM calls, classifiers, extractors). Tier them by difficulty so a hard-case failure doesn't block a release while a baseline regression does.
name: baseline
description: Simple, unambiguous inputs. A healthy model passes 90%+.
//pass_gate: Fraction of cases that must pass for the tier to be green. Set to null for diagnostic-only tiers (adversarial edge cases you track but don't gate on).

cases.input: Email the Q3 report to the board by Friday

expected.title: Email the Q3 report to the board

tool_mocks.//: Keyed by tool fingerprint so evaluation runs offline — no live API/calendar/email calls. Provide the canned response each mocked tool should return.
